function_v0.doc:
Initializes the Collateral contract by setting the Coordinator that created the collateral,
the Beacon that the collateral uses, the initial admin and the name of the collateral.
- `env`: The environment of the contract.
- `coordinator`: The address of the Coordinator that created the collateral.
- `beacon`: The address of the Beacon that the collateral uses.
- `admin`: The initial admin of the Collateral.
- `name`: The name of the Collateral.
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Transfers the team of the Collateral contract.
- `env`: The environment of the contract.
- `new_admin`: The address of the new admin.
- `new_name`: The new name of the Collateral.

# Panics
- [`CollateralError::NewAdminIsCurrentAdmin`]: If the new admin is the same as the current admin.
- [`CollateralError::NameIsEmpty`]: If the new name is empty.
function_v0.name: transfer_team

function_v0.doc:
Withdraws an asset from the Collateral contract.
- `env`: The environment of the contract.
- `coordinator`: The address of the Coordinator that is invoking the function.
- `asset`: The address of the asset to withdraw.
- `amount`: The amount of the asset to withdraw.
- `recipient`: The address of the recipient of the asset.

# Panics
- [`CollateralError::Unauthorized`]: If the coordinator is not supported by the beacon or
the access to the collateral in the beacon is paused.
function_v0.name: withdraw

function_v0.doc:
Gets the address of the Beacon associated to the Collateral contract.
- `env`: The environment of the contract.

### Returns
The address of the Beacon associated to the Collateral contract.
function_v0.name: get_beacon

function_v0.doc:
Gets the address of the Coordinator associated to the Collateral contract.
- `env`: The environment of the contract.

### Returns
The address of the Coordinator associated to the Collateral contract.
function_v0.name: get_coordinator

function_v0.doc:
Gets the name of the Collateral contract.
- `env`: The environment of the contract.

### Returns
The name of the Collateral contract.
function_v0.name: get_name

function_v0.doc:
Gets the admin of the Collateral contract.
- `env`: The environment of the contract.

### Returns
The admin of the Collateral contract.
function_v0.name: get_admin

udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Defines the errors that can be emitted by the Collateral contract.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: CollateralError

cases.doc: The caller is not authorized to perform this action.
cases.name: Unauthorized

cases.doc: When migration is attempted but not allowed due to upgrade state.
cases.name: MigrationNotAllowed
